\title{FRAME2\_NEYMAN: Block Group Frame for Detroit Transportation Security Survey}
\author{Team Neyman -- SURV 745}
\date{}

\begin{document}

\maketitle

\section*{Description}

This document presents the block group-level area frame for the Detroit Transportation Security Survey. The frame consists of 614 block groups in Detroit, Michigan, compiled from the 2020 U.S. Census. Block groups are the smallest geographic units for which the Census Bureau publishes sample data. Each block group includes demographic information necessary for survey design and sample allocation, including total persons, households, age-specific populations, and a composite measure of size (CompMOS) used for probability-proportional-to-size sampling.

\section*{Summary Statistics}

\begin{itemize}
\item \textbf{Number of Block Groups:} 614
\item \textbf{Total Population:} 639,090
\item \textbf{Total Adults (18+):} 480,102
\item \textbf{Total Households:} 309,902
\item \textbf{Total Composite MOS:} 2154.46\
\end{itemize}
